title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Written AI agents human contributors landing repo cold. full design rationale lives approved plan ~/.claude/plans/-want--set-virtual-scroll.md.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: planscanR R package BIOGAIN project (Net Biodiversity Gain spatial energy planning). provides single, unified R API (get_assessments()) fetching environmental-assessment records (EIA, SEA, follow-advice) European national portals — modelled aloftdata/getRad. v0.1 scope. Three country handlers ship: - Netherlands (get_assessments_nl()) — Commissie m.e.r. adviezenregister commissiemer.nl. - Germany (get_assessments_de()) — UVP-Verbund federated portal uvp-verbund.de. - Austria (get_assessments_at()) — Umweltbundesamt UVP-DB secure.umweltbundesamt./uvpdb. Metadata-: portal’s HTML pages document attachments sit behind Keycloak login wall; three open JSON service handlers (mapsdata, mapsgeom, vorhabenInfo) expose record metadata anonymously. handler returns rich tibble rows attachment_urls local_path always empty, date_decision always NA (portal exposes year). Reflected get_assessments_coverage()$status "supported   (metadata-)". architecture multi-country day one — adding DK / etc. pure additive change. scope v0.1. Spatial output (sf), zoning/plan documents, credential management (keyring), LLM-based classification & normalisation. flagged roadmap (§6) don’t get prematurely wedged .

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Every per-country handler self-contained file R/get_assessments_<cc>.R selected purely switch R/get_assessments.R. S3 / class hierarchy — explicit functional dispatch .
code: get_assessments(country, ...)   ├── normalise_country() / assert_country()   ├── select_assessments_handler(country)    # switch() returning a function   │     ├── get_assessments_nl(...)          # commissiemer.nl   │     └── get_assessments_de(...)          # uvp-verbund.de   │     # get_assessments_dk(...)            # post-v0.1   │     # get_assessments_at(...)            # post-v0.1   └── validate_result_schema()               # invariant gate before returning

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Required columns (validated validate_result_schema(), every handler MUST emit right types): Conventional columns (use names portal exposes concept, cross-country tibbles can bind_rows()-ed cleanly): title, summary, native_type, jurisdiction, status, date_published, date_decision, competent_authority, proponent, file_sha256, relevance_score, relevance_model, download_status. Per-handler attachment splits. portal groups attachments named sections may add parallel list-columns. NL uses two: attachment_urls_source / local_path_source — files “Documenten waarop het advies gebaseerd” (underlying EIA/SEA reports — substantive documents downstream analysis). attachment_urls_advice / local_path_advice — files “Adviezen en persberichten” (Commissie advice + press releases). DE uses four: attachment_urls_uvp_bericht / local_path_uvp_bericht — “UVP-Bericht, ggf. Antragsunterlagen” (substantive UVP report + applicant docs). attachment_urls_berichte / local_path_berichte — “Berichte und Empfehlungen”. attachment_urls_auslegung / local_path_auslegung — “Auslegungsinformationen” (public-consultation notices). attachment_urls_weitere / local_path_weitere — “Weitere Unterlagen” (materials; often biggest section). attachment_urls / local_path remain deduplicated union (source / substantive sections first), required-columns schema always satisfied. read_record_sidecar() country-agnostic: attachment_urls_<section> list-column handler emits flows sidecar back without changes . download_status list-column (download = TRUE): one tibble per record columns url, local_path, status, size_bytes, sha256, reason. Values status: "downloaded", "cached", "skipped_size", "failed". normalisation fetch time. Status, type, jurisdiction strings stay portal’s vocabulary (Dutch / German / Danish / …). Cross-portal normalisation responsibility future classify_assessments() step, fetcher. Extra columns encouraged. Handlers can add country-specific column like — validate_result_schema() enforces required set. New conventional columns can promoted later minor release.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: License: GPL-3. Formatter: Air line-width = 120 (see air.toml). Run air format . pushing. HTTP: every outbound call goes req_planscanr() R/utils_http.R user-agent, retry, HTTP-cache behaviour stay consistent. Caching: file cache root tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache"), overridable via cache_dir argument options(planscanR.cache_dir). Layout: separate HTTP cache — sidecar JSONs cache, per-country handlers consult via sidecar_url_index() going network. [clear_cache()] removes files/ tree (optionally scoped country); pair refresh = TRUE next call want fresh fetches afterwards. download layer pre-flights every URL HEAD; files exceeding getOption("planscanR.max_file_size_mb", 50) skipped recorded download_status. Already--disk non-empty files become status = "cached" unless overwrite = TRUE. Errors carry classed conditions (planscanR_error_unsupported_country, planscanR_error_bad_input, planscanR_error_bad_schema, planscanR_warning_partial) tests can target cleanly. Tests: testthat (edition 3) + httptest2 mocks; live HTTP CI. Live tests, , live tests/manual/ git-ignored. Secrets: deferred future release; keyring dependency v0.1.
code: <root>/   files/<country>/<document_id>/     <document_id>.meta.json                          # sidecar (see §4b)     <country>_<document_id>_<slug>.<ext>             # flatten-safe basename

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Every successfully processed record persisted sidecar JSON files/<country>/<document_id>/<document_id>.meta.json — written atomically inside per-record loop, interrupted run leaves N fully-indexable records disk (N orphan dirs). sidecar carries full record (country, source_portal, document_id, url, title, summary, dates, competent authority, proponent, relevance_score, etc.) plus per-file files[] array mirroring download_status columns (status, size_bytes, sha256, reason, section). Schema version: 1. sidecar authoritative cache. Per-country handlers consult sidecar_url_index(country) start every call build url -> sidecar-path lookup; URL -disk sidecar loaded JSON rather re-fetched HTTP. makes re-scoring already-scanned slice new topic essentially free (embedding compute, zero network). Pass refresh = TRUE bypass sidecar lookup force fresh detail-page fetches. Sidecar writes merge relevance_scores array: prior topic entries whose slug isn’t present current run preserved. running topic = c(wind = "...") multi-topic scan doesn’t wipe solar / power_grid scores disk — wind entry replaced. index_cache(cache_dir = NULL, country = NULL) walks every sidecar root reconstructs tibble matching planscanR schema — portal calls. Use : - re-read previously-downloaded slice offline; - enumerate ’s disk deciding else fetch; - recover manually relocating flattening files (basenames globally unique, find files/ -exec mv {} flat/ safe).

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Create R/get_assessments_<cc>.R signature surface get_assessments_nl(). handler must return tibble passes validate_result_schema(). Add one line switch R/get_assessments.R: <cc> = get_assessments_<cc>,. Update supported_countries() R/utils_dispatch.R get_assessments_coverage() tibble accordingly. Record fixtures httptest2::capture_requests() tests/testthat/fixtures/<cc>/ add tests/testthat/test-get_assessments_<cc>.R. Document portal-specific search-facet vocabularies (status, native_type, etc.) handler’s roxygen. ’s whole recipe — edits core dispatcher needed.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: biogain_assessment_topics() (R/topics.R) returns canonical six-topic set BIOGAIN project uses environmental-assessment registers: ’s opt-default, applied automatically — users pass return value topic [get_assessments()] want set, non-BIOGAIN use-cases just pass . English phrases deliberately generic multilingual embedding model can semantically bridge portal’s vocabulary without translation.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: function thin helper returns named character vector. Three places package consume : get_assessments() / per-country handlers — pass topic argument. record’s title + summary embedded compared six topic vectors single pass; result tibble gains one relevance_score_<slug> column per topic. score_assessments() — vector, re-scoring existing tibble (e.g. one obtained index_cache()) without re-fetching. Sidecar JSON — write_sidecar = TRUE, topic gets entry per-record relevance_scores array slug names vector. Subsequent runs merge array, score_assessments() different topic set adds new entries alongside BIOGAIN ones rather clobbering . restrict sidecar specific topic set, re-score set sweep non-matching topic entries (see [/tmp/biogain_rescan.R] reference pattern).
code: options(planscanR.cache_dir = "/path/to/cache") res <- get_assessments(   "nl",   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   download = FALSE         # score-only; no PDFs fetched ) res$relevance_score_wind res$relevance_score_energy_transition_strategy recs   <- index_cache("/path/to/cache") scored <- score_assessments(   recs,   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   write_sidecar = TRUE     # persist back to the sidecars on disk )

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: Pass relevance_threshold drop records don’t clear topic. scalar threshold applies topics (record passes topic clears ); named numeric vector lets set per-topic cutoffs.
code: # Keep records that look like wind, solar, or grid (any topic >= 0.5) get_assessments("nl",   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   relevance_threshold = 0.5,   download = FALSE)  # Per-topic thresholds — tighter wind, looser everything else get_assessments("nl",   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   relevance_threshold = c(wind = 0.6,                           renewable_energy = 0.45,                           energy_transition_strategy = 0.5),   download = FALSE)

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: biogain_assessment_topics() just named character vector; merge override freely.
code: extended <- c(   biogain_assessment_topics(),   battery_storage = "battery energy storage and grid balancing",   geothermal      = "geothermal heat and underground energy" ) get_assessments("nl", topic = extended, download = FALSE)

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: get_assessments() accepts optional topic parameter. set, candidate record’s title + summary embedded scored cosine similarity topic vector(s) attachments downloaded. relevance_threshold download-gate : records fall keep sidecar JSON remain returned tibble — PDFs skipped. means later re-run different threshold (none ) costs nothing network: metadata + per-file attachment URLs already disk index_cache() / sidecar-first re-fetch can pick offline. Single vs multi-topic — topic accepts either: - single character string (legacy mode): adds relevance_score + relevance_model columns; - named character vector like c(wind = "wind energy", solar = "solar energy", res = "regional energy   transition strategy"): adds one relevance_score_<slug> per topic plus shared relevance_model. Adding extra topics essentially free — per-record embed runs extra cosine per topic. relevance_threshold accepts scalar (topic ≥ scalar passes) named numeric vector matching topic slugs (named topic clears cutoff passes). offline rescoring existing tibble new topics without re-fetching anything portal, use score_assessments(records, topic, model, write_sidecar = ...). Pairs well index_cache(). Pluggable model interface (S3) - Built-default: embedding_model_minilm() — sentence-transformers paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2 via reticulate. Lazy Python init first use; needs reticulate::py_install("sentence-transformers") (reticulate::py_require("sentence-transformers") per session modern uv-backed config). - Custom backend: embedding_model(name, languages, embed_fn) returns S3 object participates interface without writing methods. - Required S3 methods new subclass: embed_text(), supported_languages(), model_name(). - relevance scorer warns per (country, model) record’s country language falls outside model’s documented supported_languages() list. Country → language map lives R/utils_language.R. Sidecar persistence relevance scores - Single-topic mode: legacy relevance_score + relevance_model fields. - Multi-topic mode: relevance_scores: [{topic, score, model, scored_at}, ...] array. read_record_sidecar() fans back relevance_score_<slug> columns. Old sidecars (without array) still read fine — just don’t add per-topic columns.

title: AGENTS.md — planscanR project orientation
text: row, find cached PDFs local_path. Split PDF pages_per_chunk chunks (default 5–10) — documents can hundreds pages. Convert chunk markdown via Python docling package, called R via reticulate. Send markdown LLM classification. Aggregate per-document classification + confidence; add new columns tibble (classified_type, classified_confidence, classified_at). Never overload existing columns. Implication v0.1 design: don’t mutate downloaded PDFs, leave room derived/ subdir cache root. Additional country handlers — DE, DK, beyond. Order committed. keyring-based secrets portals grow require API keys; slot naming convention reserved planscanR_<country>_<portal>. classify_assessments() also home cross-portal vocabulary normalisation (status, type, jurisdiction); fetcher stays raw.

what: Retrieve Environmental-Assessment Records From European Portals
title: Retrieve Environmental-Assessment Records From European Portals
text: R package retrieving SEA, EIA, zoning documents national regional spatial-data portals across Europe. Developed BIOGAIN project support Net Biodiversity Gain spatial energy planning.

what: Discovery configuration for the Austrian UVP-DB. — at_discovery_config

title: Discovery configuration for the Austrian UVP-DB. — at_discovery_config
text: list following named elements: query_templates — list function(record) -> character, producing one search query (NULL skip). state_domains — named list bundesland -> character vector authority domains scope queries . aktenzahl_regex — regex detects country's primary identifier PDF text. matches UBA-internal AZ 02 NNNN plus couple dash/-space variants. extract_proponent — function(record) -> character, pulls proponent name record's summary (returns NA failure). extra_signals — character vector additional patterns validator check PDF text (e.g. legal-basis strings).

title: Discovery configuration for the Austrian UVP-DB. — at_discovery_config
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cfg <- at_discovery_config() rec <- index_cache(country = "at")[1, ] lapply(cfg$query_templates, function(f) f(rec)) } # }

text: Returns canonical set search topics used BIOGAIN project (Net Biodiversity Gain spatial energy planning) scoring environmental-assessment records. names returned vector column-suffix slugs appear result tibble (e.g. relevance_score_wind); values English phrases embedded multilingual model.

title: BIOGAIN-default topic phrases for relevance scoring. — biogain_assessment_topics
code: biogain_assessment_topics()

title: BIOGAIN-default topic phrases for relevance scoring. — biogain_assessment_topics
text: named character vector. Names stable slugs used column suffixes; values topic phrases passed embedding model.

title: BIOGAIN-default topic phrases for relevance scoring. — biogain_assessment_topics
text: topics opt-default — pass return value topic get_assessments() (score_assessments()) want BIOGAIN set. use-cases pass topic vector. Cross-country notes: energy_transition_strategy intended bridge NL Regionale Energie Strategie (RES), DE Klimaschutzkonzept / regional energy plans, FR SRADDET / PCAET, Energiestrategie, similar instruments. renewable_zoning intended bridge spatial-designation instruments like NL zoekgebieden, DE Vorrangzonen, EU RED III "renewable acceleration areas". English phrases deliberately generic multilingual embedding model can semantically bridge portal's vocabulary without translation.

title: BIOGAIN-default topic phrases for relevance scoring. — biogain_assessment_topics
code: biogain_assessment_topics() #>                                                        wind  #>                                               "wind energy"  #>                                                       solar  #>                                              "solar energy"  #>                                                  power_grid  #> "power lines, distribution and transmission infrastructure"  #>                                            renewable_energy  #>                                          "renewable energy"  #>                                  energy_transition_strategy  #>          "regional energy transition strategy and planning"  #>                                            renewable_zoning  #>  "renewable energy zoning and designated development areas"   if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Score a small slice of the NL register against the BIOGAIN topic set res <- get_assessments(   "nl",   topic = biogain_assessment_topics(),   limit = 5,   download = FALSE ) } # }

title: Candidate labels for BIOGAIN zero-shot classification. — biogain_classification_labels
text: named character vector: names stable slugs (used column suffixes, e.g. class_score_wind), values natural-language hypotheses fed zero-shot model. set mutually exclusive (used multi_label = FALSE): record assigned single best label.

title: Candidate labels for BIOGAIN zero-shot classification. — biogain_classification_labels
text: Crucially mixes positive energy classes explicit negative classes (water management, general land-use / spatial planning, non-energy). record whose best label negative class classified -relevant — removes Flurneuordnung / Wasserwirtschaft / business-park records clear cosine 0.5 noisy renewable_zoning topic. relevant attribute lists slugs count BIOGAIN-relevant.

what: Classify assessment records with a zero-shot model. — classify_assessments
title: Classify assessment records with a zero-shot model. — classify_assessments
text: Offline pass (portal calls): record, classifies title + summary + category labels adds verdict new columns. Pairs index_cache() score_assessments() — harvest-broad-classify-later workflow.

title: Classify assessment records with a zero-shot model. — classify_assessments
code: classify_assessments(   records,   classifier = NULL,   labels = biogain_classification_labels(),   multi_label = FALSE,   batch_size = 64L,   write_sidecar = FALSE )

title: Classify assessment records with a zero-shot model. — classify_assessments
text: records tibble (get_assessments() / index_cache()); must least title (ideally summary, native_type). classifier planscanR_classifier. Defaults classify_model_zeroshot(). labels Named character vector candidate labels (see biogain_classification_labels(), default). relevant attribute marks slugs BIOGAIN-relevant; absent, every label treated relevant. multi_label FALSE (default) labels mutually exclusive (softmax); negative classes compete positive ones, point. TRUE scores label independently. batch_size Number records handed classifier per call — controls progress granularity R-Python round trips. distinct model's GPU batch_size (set classify_model_zeroshot()), controls NLI pairs batched device. write_sidecar TRUE, persist verdict record's sidecar JSON. Default FALSE (-memory ).

title: Classify assessment records with a zero-shot model. — classify_assessments
text: records class_* columns added.

title: Classify assessment records with a zero-shot model. — classify_assessments
text: Added columns: class_label — best label slug. class_score — probability best label. class_relevant — TRUE best label relevant attribute labels (.e. energy class, negative class). class_model — classifier's name. class_score_<slug> — one column per label probability.

title: Classify assessment records with a zero-shot model. — classify_assessments
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ recs <- index_cache(country = "de") classified <- classify_assessments(recs, write_sidecar = TRUE) table(classified$class_label, classified$class_relevant) } # }

what: Local zero-shot classifier backed by a HuggingFace NLI model. — classify_model_zeroshot
title: Local zero-shot classifier backed by a HuggingFace NLI model. — classify_model_zeroshot
text: Lazily constructs transformers zero-shot-classification pipeline first use (cached session). default model multilingual NLI model MoritzLaurer/mDeBERTa-v3-base-xnli-multilingual-nli-2mil7, handles German / Dutch / English text natively — translation required.

title: Local zero-shot classifier backed by a HuggingFace NLI model. — classify_model_zeroshot
code: classify_model_zeroshot(   model_id = "MoritzLaurer/mDeBERTa-v3-base-xnli-multilingual-nli-2mil7",   device = NULL,   batch_size = 16L )

title: Local zero-shot classifier backed by a HuggingFace NLI model. — classify_model_zeroshot
text: model_id HuggingFace model ID. device Torch device: "mps", "cuda", "cpu", NULL auto-detect (MPS Apple Silicon, else CUDA, else CPU). batch_size GPU batch size pipeline (number text-hypothesis NLI pairs evaluated per forward pass). single GPU main throughput lever: 16 roughly doubles throughput unbatched MPS. Larger values (e.g. 64) often slower variable-length sequences get padded batch maximum, long outliers dominate — 16 good default. benefit process-level parallelism single GPU (workers contend one device reloads model).

title: Local zero-shot classifier backed by a HuggingFace NLI model. — classify_model_zeroshot
text: planscanR_classifier_zeroshot S3 object.

title: Local zero-shot classifier backed by a HuggingFace NLI model. — classify_model_zeroshot
text: Requires Python packages transformers, torch, sentencepiece protobuf (last two needed mDeBERTa tokenizer). Install reticulate::py_require(c("transformers","torch","sentencepiece","protobuf")).

title: Local zero-shot classifier backed by a HuggingFace NLI model. — classify_model_zeroshot
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ clf <- classify_model_zeroshot() labels <- c(wind = "wind energy project", other = "unrelated to energy") classify_text(clf, c("Windpark Test", "Wohnungsbau"), labels) } # }

what: Invalidate (delete) part or all of the planscanR cache. — clear_cache
title: Invalidate (delete) part or all of the planscanR cache. — clear_cache
text: Use actually want force refresh — example portal's HTML layout changes, free disk space. default function asks interactive confirmation deleting anything, refuses operate directories outside resolved cache root.

title: Invalidate (delete) part or all of the planscanR cache. — clear_cache
code: clear_cache(cache_dir = NULL, country = NULL, confirm = TRUE)

title: Invalidate (delete) part or all of the planscanR cache. — clear_cache
text: cache_dir Optional cache root. Defaults getOption("planscanR.cache_dir") value (falls back tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache")). country Optional ISO-2 country code. supplied, country's subtree (<root>/files/<country>/) removed. Otherwise whole <root>/files/ tree removed. confirm TRUE (default) session interactive, print summary (path, file count, size) ask explicit y/n deleting. Set FALSE scripted/automated use.

title: Invalidate (delete) part or all of the planscanR cache. — clear_cache
text: Invisibly, tibble describing removed (path, n_files, bytes, removed).

title: Invalidate (delete) part or all of the planscanR cache. — clear_cache
text: cache single tree <root>/files/<country>/<doc_id>/ containing per-record sidecar JSON files plus downloaded attachments. clear_cache() removes tree (country-scoped subset).

title: Invalidate (delete) part or all of the planscanR cache. — clear_cache
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Wipe everything under the default cache root, with confirmation prompt clear_cache()  # Wipe only NL files (sidecars + attachments) clear_cache(country = "nl")  # Scripted use (no prompt) clear_cache(confirm = FALSE) } # }

what: Discover attachments for records the portal returned empty. — discover_attachments
title: Discover attachments for records the portal returned empty. — discover_attachments
text: input record, function:

title: Discover attachments for records the portal returned empty. — discover_attachments
code: discover_attachments(   records,   backend = NULL,   country_config = NULL,   relevance_model = NULL,   queries_per_record = 3L,   max_pdfs_per_record = 100L,   max_results_per_query = 20L,   cache_dir = NULL,   max_file_size_mb = NULL,   dry_run = FALSE,   skip_if_attached = TRUE,   semantic_threshold = 0.5 )

title: Discover attachments for records the portal returned empty. — discover_attachments
text: records tibble records (e.g. get_assessments() index_cache()). rows must share country. backend search_backend(). Defaults search_backend_tavily() (requires TAVILY_API_KEY). country_config Per-country discovery config (e.g. at_discovery_config()). NULL, resolved records$country. relevance_model Optional embedding model validator's semantic backup signal. NULL, validator runs without semantic check. queries_per_record Cap number templates fired per record. Lower = cheaper, less recall. max_pdfs_per_record Cap number validated PDFs kept per record. max_results_per_query Pass-backend's max_results. cache_dir Optional cache root. Defaults getOption("planscanR.cache_dir"). max_file_size_mb Per-PDF size cap. Defaults package option. dry_run TRUE, runs phases 1-2 skips ingest (sidecar writes, PDFs copied cache). returned tibble carries -discoveries discovery_log column inspection. skip_if_attached TRUE (default), records already length(attachment_urls) > 0 skipped — discovery records portal returned empty. semantic_threshold Cosine-similarity threshold validator's semantic backup signal.

title: Discover attachments for records the portal returned empty. — discover_attachments
text: input tibble attachment_urls local_path augmented records got new validated PDFs, plus discovery_log list-column one entry per (record, query) attempt.

title: Discover attachments for records the portal returned empty. — discover_attachments
text: Discovers — generates small set search queries record's metadata runs search_backend(). Validates — candidate URL points PDF, downloads copy runs discover_validate() record. Failed candidates discarded disk. Ingests — PDFs pass, copies canonical cache layout (<cache>/files/<country>/<document_id>/) appends record's sidecar JSON source = "discovery" plus discovery_log[] audit entry. package's escape hatch portals expose document URLs anonymous callers. Austrian UVP-DB canonical example — see get_assessments_at() — function portal-agnostic country supplies discovery config.

what: Validate a candidate (record, URL) pair against a downloaded PDF. — discover_validate
title: Validate a candidate (record, URL) pair against a downloaded PDF. — discover_validate
text: Runs four signals order:

title: Validate a candidate (record, URL) pair against a downloaded PDF. — discover_validate
code: discover_validate(   record,   pdf_path,   cfg,   relevance_model = NULL,   semantic_threshold = 0.5 )

title: Validate a candidate (record, URL) pair against a downloaded PDF. — discover_validate
text: record 1-row tibble planscanR result shape. pdf_path Path local copy candidate PDF. cfg Country discovery config (e.g. at_discovery_config()). relevance_model Optional embedding model semantic signal. NULL, semantic signal skipped (means signals 1-3 must carry validation). semantic_threshold Cosine-similarity threshold signal 4.

title: Validate a candidate (record, URL) pair against a downloaded PDF. — discover_validate
text: list : passed (logical), signals (named logical), notes (character), text (extracted first-10-pages text, used downstream candidate promoted sidecar).

title: Validate a candidate (record, URL) pair against a downloaded PDF. — discover_validate
text: Aktenzahl exact — country's primary identifier appears verbatim PDF text. Strongest signal. Title overlap (hybrid count/density) — distinguishing title tokens (title tokens minus country's stoplist) appear least PDF text, project mentioned substantively: either >= 5 total distinguishing-token occurrences, (>= 2 total >= 0.4 occurrences per scanned page). dual rule keeps short focused documents (1-page Kundmachungen 3 mentions) rejecting long documents mention project passing (97-page UVEs 2 mentions buried comparative section). Also requires least one generic title token text PDF mentioning place name without UVP language pass. Extra-signal presence — least one country config's extra_signals (e.g. "UVP-G 2000") PDF, hybrid count/density rule holds. Semantic backup — cosine similarity first-10-pages text record's title+summary clears semantic_threshold (default 0.5), using relevance model. fires none . single signal passing sufficient. result reports signal(s) fired calling code can apply stricter precision policies wants.

title: Build a custom planscanR embedding model. — embedding_model
text: name Character scalar. Used language-support warning sidecar JSON record model produced score. languages Character vector ISO-639-1 codes model documented support. Used score_records() warn record's country language falls outside set. embed_fn function one argument (x, character vector) returns numeric matrix one row per element stable embedding dimension across calls.

title: Build a custom planscanR embedding model. — embedding_model
text: S3 object class c("planscanR_embedding_custom", "planscanR_embedding_model").

title: Build a custom planscanR embedding model. — embedding_model
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Trivial example: hash-based "embeddings" for testing em <- embedding_model(   name = "fake-hash",   languages = c("en", "nl"),   embed_fn = function(x) {     matrix(rnorm(length(x) * 32), nrow = length(x))   } ) supported_languages(em) embed_text(em, c("hello", "hallo")) } # }

what: Build an embedding model backed by sentence-transformers. — embedding_model_minilm

title: Build an embedding model backed by sentence-transformers. — embedding_model_minilm

title: Build an embedding model backed by sentence-transformers. — embedding_model_minilm
text: model_id Hugging Face model ID. Defaults "sentence-transformers/paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2". languages Override documented language list. Defaults 50 languages documented default model. Ignored user plugging different model whose language inventory differs.

title: Build an embedding model backed by sentence-transformers. — embedding_model_minilm
text: planscanR_embedding_minilm S3 object.

what: Retrieve environmental-assessment records from a national portal. — get_assessments
title: Retrieve environmental-assessment records from a national portal. — get_assessments
text: Unified entry point dispatches country per-country handler. Returns tibble records. shape returned tibble follows planscanR schema: small required-columns set guaranteed across countries, additional columns exposed portal appended freely. See Return value details.

title: Retrieve environmental-assessment records from a national portal. — get_assessments
code: get_assessments(   country,   date_range = NULL,   limit = Inf,   download = TRUE,   cache_dir = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   max_file_size_mb = NULL,   write_sidecar = TRUE,   refresh = FALSE,   topic = NULL,   relevance_threshold = NULL,   relevance_model = NULL,   discover = FALSE,   search_backend = NULL,   ... )

title: Retrieve environmental-assessment records from a national portal. — get_assessments
text: country Character scalar, ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (case). v0.1 supports "nl", "de", "". See supported_countries(). date_range Optional length-2 vector c(, ) Date, POSIXct, character. Filters date_published / date_decision semantics decided per handler. limit Maximum number records return (default Inf). download Logical. TRUE (default), attachment files referenced record downloaded local cache. FALSE, metadata returned; local_path character(0) every row. cache_dir Optional cache root. Defaults tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache"). overwrite Logical. TRUE, re-download attachments even cached copy exists. max_file_size_mb Numeric cap (MiB) per-file download size. URLs whose announced actual size exceeds cap skipped recorded download_status column status "skipped_size". NULL (default) defers getOption("planscanR.max_file_size_mb", 50); Inf disables cap. write_sidecar Logical. TRUE (default), every returned record persisted <document_id>.meta.json file alongside attachments cache can re-indexed offline via index_cache(). refresh Logical. FALSE (default), records URLs already sidecar JSON disk loaded directly sidecar — detail-page HTTP request . makes re-scoring new topics essentially free slice cached. Set TRUE force fresh detail-page fetches (useful portal genuinely changed). topic Optional character vector topic phrases. Pass single string (e.g. "wind energy infrastructure") named vector like c(wind = "wind energy", solar = "solar energy", res = "regional energy transition strategy"). candidate record's title+summary embedded per call scored cosine similarity every topic, attachments downloaded. Adds one relevance_score_<slug> column per topic plus shared relevance_model. Unnamed topics get auto-slugified phrase. Adding extra topics costs essentially nothing — per-record embed expensive step runs . Every scored record sidecar'd returned regardless score. relevance_threshold Optional cutoff [-1, 1]. Download-gate : records score threshold still appear returned tibble still get sidecar JSON disk — PDF attachments skipped. lets re-run different threshold (threshold) later without re-hitting portal. Scalar threshold: PDFs downloaded topic clears . Named numeric vector (e.g. c(wind = 0.5, solar = 0.4)): per-topic cutoffs, downloads happen named topic clears cutoff. NULL (default) score-; every record's PDFs downloaded (download = TRUE). relevance_model planscanR_embedding_model. Defaults embedding_model_minilm() (sentence-transformers paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2 via reticulate). Pass custom one built embedding_model() plug different backend. discover Logical. TRUE, portal handler returns, records came back attachments (length(attachment_urls) == 0) passed discover_attachments() find PDFs via web-search backend. default v0.x — metadata-handlers like emit one-shot informational message pointing flag. See discover_attachments() backend / config controls. search_backend Optional search_backend() discovery pass. Defaults search_backend_tavily() discover = TRUE. ... Forwarded country handler. Common search parameters documented get_assessments_nl().

title: Retrieve environmental-assessment records from a national portal. — get_assessments
text: tibble least required columns: country Character (ISO-2, lowercase). source_portal Character (e.g. "commissiemer.nl"). document_id Character. Portal-native ID, unique within portal. url Character. Canonical portal landing URL. retrieved_at POSIXct (UTC). attachment_urls List-column character vectors. local_path List-column character vectors (parallel attachment_urls). Handlers may add columns title, native_type, status, date_published, competent_authority, proponent, jurisdiction, etc. cross-portal normalisation applied — values stay source portal's vocabulary.

title: Retrieve environmental-assessment records from a national portal. — get_assessments
text: Per-country search parameters forwarded .... implemented every handler supports (e.g. theme, advice_type, province, status, query); consult per-country handler's documentation (e.g. get_assessments_nl()) exact parameter surface vocabulary valid values.

what: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
text: Implementation get_assessments() Austria. Backed UVP-DB run Umweltbundesamt https://secure.umweltbundesamt./uvpdb/public. Compared NL DE handlers, portal metadata-: procedure register per-procedure summary exposed via open JSON service handlers, every document attachment lives behind Keycloak login therefore retrievable version.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
code: get_assessments_at(   date_range = NULL,   limit = Inf,   download = TRUE,   cache_dir = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   max_file_size_mb = NULL,   write_sidecar = TRUE,   refresh = FALSE,   topic = NULL,   relevance_threshold = NULL,   relevance_model = NULL,   query = NULL,   jurisdiction = NULL,   ... )

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
text: date_range Length-2 vector c(, ) dates parseable strings. Compared record's year; see Filter coverage. limit Integer. Maximum records return. Defaults Inf. full register small (~500 records), cold-cache full crawl completes minutes. download, cache_dir, overwrite, max_file_size_mb, write_sidecar, refresh See get_assessments(). download, overwrite, max_file_size_mb accepted ignored — PDFs reachable. topic, relevance_threshold, relevance_model Forwarded get_assessments(). relevance_threshold documented download-gate; observable effect downloads gate. query Free-text substring match title + summary (client- side). portal server-side full-text search. jurisdiction Character vector. Substring match bundeslaender (comma-joined Austrian federal-state list). ... Reserved future extensions; unused arguments warned .

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
text: tibble; see get_assessments() required schema.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
text: public HTML pages portal sit behind Keycloak login wall. Three JSON service handlers, however, open:   Enumeration single mapsdata call returns ~500 records keyed Aktenzahl (AZ), carrying v2id, province, year, title, type. Per-record detail comes one vorhabenInfo call per v2id. pagination, CSRF, session requirement; typology mapping (type integer → German legend) captured static constant file portal rarely changes .
code: https://secure.umweltbundesamt.at/uvpdb/?servicehandler=mapsdata https://secure.umweltbundesamt.at/uvpdb/?servicehandler=mapsgeom https://secure.umweltbundesamt.at/uvpdb/?servicehandler=vorhabenInfo&v2id=<id>

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
text: query — case-insensitive substring match title + summary. date_range — matched year, treating record's year full January 1 – December 31 window. date_decision always NA portal expose decision last-modified timestamp anonymous callers; synthetic mid-year date pretend precision source lacks. jurisdiction — substring match bundeslaender (comma- joined Austrian federal-state list, e.g. jurisdiction = "Bayern" never matches; jurisdiction = "Wien" keeps Viennese records).

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
text: available: Austrian portal expose document URLs anonymous callers. every record handler returns attachment_urls = character(0), local_path = character(0), empty download_status tibble. download argument accepted API symmetry effect. Authenticated access (UBA Keycloak) scope v0.1.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Austria. — get_assessments_at
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Quick smoke test get_assessments_at(limit = 3, download = FALSE)  # Windkraft-only slice get_assessments_at(query = "Windpark", limit = 20, download = FALSE)  # All Burgenland records from a given year window get_assessments_at(   date_range = c("2016-01-01", "2018-12-31"),   jurisdiction = "Burgenland",   download = FALSE ) } # }

what: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
text: Implementation get_assessments() Germany. Backed UVP-Verbund portal https://www.uvp-verbund.de/, federated catalogue UVP (Umweltverträglichkeitsprüfung) procedures published federal-state authorities. URL enumeration uses portal's server-side full-text search (/freitextsuche) — XML sitemap. Per-record metadata parsed detail page rvest.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
code: get_assessments_de(   date_range = NULL,   limit = Inf,   download = TRUE,   cache_dir = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   max_file_size_mb = NULL,   write_sidecar = TRUE,   refresh = FALSE,   topic = NULL,   relevance_threshold = NULL,   relevance_model = NULL,   query = NULL,   jurisdiction = NULL,   ... )

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
text: date_range Length-2 vector c(, ) dates parseable strings. Filters date_decision. limit Integer. Maximum records return. Defaults Inf; strongly encouraged set small value (e.g. 50) exploring, cold-cache full crawl enumerates ~2,427 search pages. download, cache_dir, overwrite, max_file_size_mb, write_sidecar, refresh See get_assessments(). topic, relevance_threshold, relevance_model Forwarded get_assessments(). relevance_threshold download-gate : records keep sidecar + tibble row, PDFs skipped. query Free-text search string. Sent server-side q=<query>. NULL, broad fallback q=uvp used (matches ~93% register). portal's q=*:* wildcard unusable page 2+ never renders — see URL enumeration section. jurisdiction Character vector. Substring match federal-state partner displayed detail page (e.g. jurisdiction = "Bayern" keeps Bavarian records). ... Reserved future extensions; unused arguments warned .

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
text: tibble; see get_assessments() schema.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
text: portal exposes sitemap, OAI-PMH, CSW endpoint. enumeration route search interface :   portal Solr-backed q=*:* wildcard broken pagination: page 1 renders, every subsequent page returns header results. "match-" fallback query NULL use q=uvp, paginates correctly covers ~93% register (~22,574 ~24,270 records). full coverage, run scan multiple seed queries union results. toggle_procedure= (empty value) set explicitly: portal's default (toggle_procedure=) restricts results currently-running plus last-year-modified procedures silently drops ~80% historical records. cold cache, full enumeration ~2,427 pages slow; users strongly encouraged set limit (ideally query) exploring.
code: https://www.uvp-verbund.de/freitextsuche?q=<query>&toggle_procedure=&ranking=score&page=<n>

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
text: filters map cleanly portal-side parameters extractable detail-page fields active version: query — passed straight server-side q parameter (real full-text search, client-side substring match). date_range — matches date_decision, portal carries "Zuletzt geaendert" date (last-modified timestamp shown detail page header). jurisdiction — substring match federal-state partner (div.teaser-logo-partner img[alt], e.g. "Baden-Württemberg"). portal's procedure= facet (Zulassungsverfahren, Bauleitplanung, etc.) reserved future release.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
text: per-page section split: UVP detail pages group documents h4.title-font headings. set headings open-ended discovered per page rather fixed: every heading carries documents becomes parallel list-column attachment_urls_<slug> / local_path_<slug>, per-file section tag persisted sidecar JSON. Known headings get stable, curated slug; heading auto-slugged title (German digraphs transliterated ASCII), newly-appearing section type captured without code change. Curated slugs (see internal de_section_map()): uvp_bericht — "UVP-Bericht, ggf. Antragsunterlagen" (UVP report plus applicant's project documents — substantive documents downstream analysis). berichte — "Berichte und Empfehlungen" (technical reports recommendations). entscheidung — "Entscheidung" (decision / Bescheid documents). auslegung — "Auslegungsinformationen" (public-consultation notices). weitere — "Weitere Unterlagen" (catch-section; often large). attachment_urls / local_path deduplicated union across discovered sections, ordered curated-first (order ) auto-slugged sections page order. Required planscanR schema. download = TRUE, files discovered sections fetched — subject max_file_size_mb relevance gate. (data-raw/biogain_acquire.R runbook can restrict downloads chosen subset sections; handler always captures .)

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from Germany. — get_assessments_de
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Quick smoke test get_assessments_de(limit = 3, download = FALSE)  # Wind-energy search get_assessments_de(query = "windenergie", limit = 20, download = FALSE)  # Date range get_assessments_de(   date_range = c("2024-01-01", "2024-12-31"),   limit = 20,   download = FALSE ) } # }

URL enumeration uses portal's published sitemap (advice-sitemap*.xml); per-record metadata parsed detail page rvest. Free-text date-range filters applied client-side records parsed; taxonomy filters (theme, advice_type, status) accepted forward compatibility yet honoured v0.1 — see "Filter coverage" section .

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from the Netherlands. — get_assessments_nl
code: get_assessments_nl(   date_range = NULL,   limit = Inf,   download = TRUE,   cache_dir = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   max_file_size_mb = NULL,   write_sidecar = TRUE,   refresh = FALSE,   topic = NULL,   relevance_threshold = NULL,   relevance_model = NULL,   theme = NULL,   advice_type = NULL,   status = NULL,   province = NULL,   query = NULL,   ... )

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from the Netherlands. — get_assessments_nl
text: date_range Length-2 vector c(, ) dates parseable strings. Filters date_decision. NULL (default) returns dates. limit Integer. Maximum records return. Defaults Inf; strongly encouraged set small value (e.g. 50) exploring. download Logical. Download PDF attachments? Default TRUE. cache_dir Optional cache root. Defaults tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache"). overwrite Logical. TRUE, re-download attachments already cached. Cached files (non-empty, present disk) otherwise skipped reported status = "cached" download_status. max_file_size_mb Numeric cap (MiB) per-file download size. See get_assessments() details. write_sidecar Logical. Persist <document_id>.meta.json per record alongside attachments. Use index_cache() reread. refresh Logical. FALSE (default), records whose URL already sidecar JSON disk loaded directly JSON — detail-page HTTP fetch. Set TRUE force fresh fetch (e.g. portal actually changed something). topic, relevance_threshold, relevance_model Forwarded get_assessments(). topic supplied, candidate record scored, every scored record sidecar'd returned regardless threshold. relevance_threshold download-gate : records threshold keep sidecar + tibble row PDFs downloaded. theme, advice_type, status, province Character vectors. See "Filter coverage". theme, advice_type, status valid slugs get_assessments_coverage()$facets[[1]]. query Free-text search string (substring match title + URL slug). ... Reserved future extensions; unused arguments warned .

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from the Netherlands. — get_assessments_nl
text: tibble; see get_assessments() schema.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from the Netherlands. — get_assessments_nl
text: Commissie m.e.r. portal's taxonomy values (theme, advice type, status) driven JavaScript FacetWP layer yield programmatic access without browser session. result, version applies filters extractable detail page: query — case-insensitive substring match title URL slug date_range — matches date_decision ("Laatste advies uitgebracht op" field) province — substring match competent_authority (e.g. province = "Groningen" matches "Provincie Groningen") arguments theme, advice_type, status accepted (validated vocabularies get_assessments_coverage()) currently emit one-shot warning supplied. future release wire working portal-side filter path.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from the Netherlands. — get_assessments_nl
text: portal hosts ~3600 advisory records. detail page fetched cached via httr2 getOption("planscanR.cache_ttl") seconds (default 1 h), repeat runs fast. However, cold cache, enumerating full register can take many minutes downloading every attachment can use significant disk space. Always start limit (ideally query) exploring. avoid stressing server (commissiemer.nl returns HTTP 429 sustained burst), NL requests throttled one per second default — .e. ~1 s delay detail-page fetches. rate configurable via getOption("planscanR.nl_throttle_rate") (requests/sec); set falsy value disable. throttle scoped NL .

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from the Netherlands. — get_assessments_nl
text: per-page split: advice detail page commissiemer.nl groups PDFs two -page sections, handler exposes separate list-columns: attachment_urls_source / local_path_source — files "Documenten waarop het advies gebaseerd" section. underlying EIA/SEA reports submitted proponent reviewed Commissie. substantive documents downstream analysis (e.g. future classify_assessments() LLM pipeline). attachment_urls_advice / local_path_advice — files "Adviezen en persberichten" section: Commissie's advisory reports press releases. attachment_urls / local_path — union (deduplicated), ordered source documents first. Required planscanR schema. download = TRUE, files sections fetched.

title: Fetch environmental-assessment records from the Netherlands. — get_assessments_nl
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Quick smoke test get_assessments_nl(limit = 3, download = FALSE)  # Free-text query: any advice with "wind" in the title or slug get_assessments_nl(query = "wind", limit = 10, download = FALSE)  # Date range get_assessments_nl(   date_range = c("2024-01-01", "2024-12-31"),   limit = 20,   download = FALSE ) } # }

what: Walk a planscanR cache and reconstruct a tibble from every sidecar. — index_cache
title: Walk a planscanR cache and reconstruct a tibble from every sidecar. — index_cache
text: Lets re-index previously-populated cache without going back portal. Useful : downloaded large slice want quick offline tibble , manually flattened relocated files, want enumerate already disk deciding else fetch.

title: Walk a planscanR cache and reconstruct a tibble from every sidecar. — index_cache
code: index_cache(cache_dir = NULL, country = NULL)

title: Walk a planscanR cache and reconstruct a tibble from every sidecar. — index_cache

what: Re-score an existing planscanR result tibble against (additional) topics. — score_assessments
title: Re-score an existing planscanR result tibble against (additional) topics. — score_assessments
text: Thin wrapper score_records() tuned case already tibble records (get_assessments() index_cache()) want add — refresh — relevance scores without re-fetching portal data. Optionally writes updated scores back -disk sidecars index_cache() keeps visible next session.

title: Re-score an existing planscanR result tibble against (additional) topics. — score_assessments
code: score_assessments(records, topic, model = NULL, write_sidecar = FALSE)

title: Re-score an existing planscanR result tibble against (additional) topics. — score_assessments
text: records tibble planscanR result shape. topic Single string named character vector. See score_records(). model planscanR_embedding_model. Defaults embedding_model_minilm(). write_sidecar TRUE, every scored record's sidecar JSON re-written merged scores. Default FALSE (-memory ).

title: Re-score an existing planscanR result tibble against (additional) topics. — score_assessments
text: input tibble additional relevance_score_* columns (relevance_model).

title: Re-score an existing planscanR result tibble against (additional) topics. — score_assessments
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Reload everything in the cache and score against new topics offline. recs <- index_cache("/path/to/cache") scored <- score_assessments(   recs,   c(wind  = "wind energy",     solar = "solar energy",     res   = "regional energy transition strategy and planning"),   write_sidecar = TRUE ) } # }

title: Compute relevance scores for a set of records against one or more topics. — score_records
text: Cosine similarity topic's embedding record's title + summary embedding. Records embedded per call regardless many topics passed, adding extra topics essentially free.

title: Compute relevance scores for a set of records against one or more topics. — score_records
text: records tibble; must include least country, title, summary. topic character vector topic phrases. Pass named vector control column-suffix slugs; unnamed elements get auto-slugified phrase. See examples. model planscanR_embedding_model object. text_fn Optional function function(record) -> character builds text embed record. Default concatenates title summary.

title: Compute relevance scores for a set of records against one or more topics. — score_records
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Single topic — column will be relevance_score_wind_energy score_records(recs, "wind energy", em)  # Multiple topics in one pass — column names will be relevance_score_wind etc. score_records(   recs,   c(wind  = "wind energy",     solar = "solar energy",     res   = "regional energy transition strategy and planning"),   em ) } # }

text: name Short identifier backend (e.g. "tavily", "google-cse"). Surfaced logs sidecar discovery_log[]. search_fn function function(query, include_domains, max_results) returning list result objects, named list minimum url (character) optionally title, content, score.

title: Build a custom search backend. — search_backend

title: Build a custom search backend. — search_backend
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ my_backend <- search_backend(   name = "fake-google",   search_fn = function(query, include_domains, max_results) {     list(list(url = "https://example.org/x.pdf", title = "Test", score = 1))   } ) web_search(my_backend, "windpark parndorf", NULL, 5) } # }

what: Build a Tavily search backend. — search_backend_tavily
title: Build a Tavily search backend. — search_backend_tavily
text: Requires Tavily API key TAVILY_API_KEY environment variable (set ~/.Renviron per-session Sys.setenv()).

title: Build a Tavily search backend. — search_backend_tavily
code: search_backend_tavily(   api_key = NULL,   search_depth = c("basic", "advanced"),   max_results_cap = 10L )

title: Build a Tavily search backend. — search_backend_tavily
text: api_key Optional explicit key. Defaults Sys.getenv("TAVILY_API_KEY"). Stored backend object — never logged persisted package. search_depth Either "basic" (default, cheaper) "advanced" (deeper crawl per result, ~3x cost). max_results_cap Hard cap passed max_results. Tavily's basic search depth caps responses ~20 results regardless send; advanced search depth goes higher. accept 100 future API tiers (advanced depth) bottlenecked package layer. Tavily silently caps actual returned count.

title: Build a Tavily search backend. — search_backend_tavily
text: planscanR_search_backend.

title: Build a Tavily search backend. — search_backend_tavily
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ Sys.setenv(TAVILY_API_KEY = "tvly-...") tav <- search_backend_tavily() web_search(tav, "Windpark Parndorf Bescheid filetype:pdf") } # }

title: planscanR 0.0.0.9000
text: Initial development scaffold. Unified entry function get_assessments() dispatches country code. Netherlands handler get_assessments_nl() fetches Commissie m.e.r. adviezenregister (commissiemer.nl) via sitemap-based URL discovery detail-page parsing. Supports query, date_range, province filters client-side; theme, advice_type, status arguments accepted warning taxonomy filtering yet honoured. Required-columns return schema, validated validate_result_schema(): country, source_portal, document_id, url, retrieved_at, attachment_urls, local_path. Additional columns encouraged free-form. Attachments downloaded tools::R_user_dir("planscanR", "cache") files/<country>/<document_id>/. get_assessments_coverage() lists supported countries, portals, search-facet vocabularies handler accepts. Germany handler get_assessments_de() fetches federated UVP-Verbund portal (uvp-verbund.de). URL enumeration uses portal’s Solr-backed /freitextsuche search (q=*:* everything); detail-page parsing pulls title, summary, competent_authority, jurisdiction (federal-state partner), native_type (UVP-Kategorie) last-modified date. Attachments split four list-columns mirroring -page section headings: attachment_urls_uvp_bericht, _berichte, _auslegung, _weitere (plus deduplicated attachment_urls union). relevance_threshold now download-gate . Records score threshold still get sidecar JSON disk still appear returned tibble — PDF attachments skipped. makes re-runs different threshold free network. Applies NL DE handlers. Sidecar JSONs now carry URL list (per-URL section tags) even download = FALSE — known -yet-fetched URL gets pending row download_status. read_record_sidecar() / index_cache() fan per-section URLs back attachment_urls_<section> / local_path_<section> columns regardless country, now also restores country-specific extras (e.g. DE’s native_type).
